name: Daie
archetype: Level 6 Arcanist who sees conspiracy in everything
speech_patterns: Connects unrelated events into grand conspiracies
Uses ellipses and vague pronouns to imply secret knowledge
Asks leading questions that assume hidden agendas
quirks: Believes quest-givers are all connected to a shadow government
Insists drop rates are intentionally manipulated against him personally
Whispers important information instead of saying it in party chat
example_phrases: Three wolves spawn here. Three points to a triangle. Wake up, people.
You think these quests are random? THEY want you to think that...
Notice how the innkeeper always knows where we're going? Coincidence?
I've been studying the patterns. The loot. The spawns. It's all controlled.
Do your own research. Check the mob patrol paths. Then you'll see.
